features: DIRTY WORKS BATHING GRACE: The ultimate bath time pamper set from Dirty Works, Bathing Grace combines all the best bits of an at-home relaxation sesh into one fantastic gift set, perfect for bath lovers everywhere. Press pause and wash the day away.

LUSCIOUS BUBBLE BATH: Our Bathing Grace gift set includes a Dirty Works Bubble Trouble bubble bath; a top-notch extra bubbly bath soak carefully formulated for a gentle cleanse and infused with lavender and chamomile extracts for total body relaxation.

MINI BATH BOMBS: Fancy a little something extra? Pop a mini Dirty Works bath fizzer into your bath; each is scented with the signature Dirty Works fresh, floral and fabulous fragrance and packed with skin-nourishing ingredients.

PAMPER ACCESSORIES: This bath gift set includes a super soft bow headband to keep your hair up and out of the way, plus two pairs of refreshing cucumber eye pads to help soothe those tired eyes. Who said bath time couldn’t be elegant?

THE PERFECT BATH AND BODY GIFT: In need of a treat or know someone that is? Bathing Grace is the perfect luxury bubble bath gift set for any occasion. Gift to an expectant mum or new mum, granny, sister, or bestie. It’s a thoughtful bath and body gift made with on-trend ingredients and stunning fragrances for the ultimate pampering experience they will adore.
description: Product Description Press pause on the day with Dirty Works Bathing Grace Pamper Gift Set. Dirty Works Bathing Grace Pamper Gift Set is a pampering essential. We’ve selected all the best parts of an at-home spa day and combined them into one delightful bath and body gift set, perfect for total body pampering. Included in this gift box; 1 x 250ml Bubble Trouble Bubble Bath, 2 x Mini 25g Bath Fizzers, 1 x Soft Bow Headband and 2 x Cooling Cucumber Eye Pads. Everything you need to create a little bathing sanctuary of relaxation. Press pause and take time out from your routine with the Bathing Grace Pamper Set, suitable for vegans. We recommend popping one mini bath bomb into the tub, or pour in a dash of our luscious Bubble Trouble Bubble Bath, pull on our fluffy bow headband, close your eyes and place the cooling cucumber eye pads on your tired peepers for 2 – 5 minutes and enjoy some quiet unwind time. A best-seller, Bubble Trouble is the perfect combination of hydrating and cleansing, scented with our signature Dirty Works fragrance and infused with a careful balance of botanical extracts, chamomile, and lavender to nourish and rejuvenate. Available in a 250ml squeezy tube and vegan-friendly. Small but mighty, these mini bath fizzers pack a pamper punch. They are gently scented with the signature Dirty Works fragrance; fresh, fruity and sweet! Explore a delicious combination of cassis, bergamot, and peach with hints of rose, neroli and jasmine, all of which finish with deep notes of vanilla, patchouli, and sandalwood. Our mini bath bombs will leave your skin smelling as sweet and heavenly as you feel. Your pamper session awaits. Lay back into your bubbly paradise with a soft blue headband to keep flyaways off your face and the finishing touch, cooling eye patches to rejuvenate tired eyes. Perfect for unwinding, relaxing sore muscles or just some you-time. You deserve it. Gently wash away the worries of the day with a super hydrating, conditioning, and cleansing bath. Bathing Grace makes a wonderful pamper gift for new mums or expectant parents looking for some downtime. Explore the full range of fun, fabulous and affordable Dirty Works products. Whether you are looking to treat yourself or gifting for birthdays, Christmas, or any special occasion, we have all the bath, beauty, and body gift ideas to surprise and delight that special someone. Warning: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If the product gets into the eyes, rinse immediately with clean, warm water. Discontinue use if skin irritation occurs. Do not use on areas of broken or damaged skin. Ingredients "Water (Aqua/Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Fragrance (Parfum), Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, PEG-4 Rapeseedamide, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Citric Acid, Disodium EDTA, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil, Polysorbate 20, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Extract, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter Extract, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool." Safety Warning For External use only Manufacturer Contact Information Dirty Works, Brand Architekts Ltd, PO Box 443, Teddington, TW11 1AT. See more
